name: Direction
description:
What Direction Does

Direction.com offers full-scale SEO services – everything right from website audits, keyword research, and organic rankings to local SEO. Most of their solutions are service-based, but they have a tool for local SEO that helps in listing management, reputation management, and social. 

‍

Source: Direction.com

Key Features

  • Tailored SEO campaigns to dominate search rankings and drive revenue growth.
  • Local SEO services to rank higher in local searches and get listed across 70+ directories.
  • Web design and development to create stunning, high-converting websites.
  • Conversion rate optimization through advanced testing, analytics and funnel refinements.
  • Localized organic and paid social media marketing across relevant channels.
  • Tools for publishing, content localization, central inbox and streamlined workflows.
  • Reputation management solution to monitor, respond to and analyze reviews.
  • Unified platform leveraging AI to control your online reputation efficiently.

Benefits of Direction

  • Establish authority in your industry while increasing bottom-line profits.
  • Capture more market share by connecting with high-intent local customers.
  • Stand out from local competitors and become the go-to local business.
  • Drive more website traffic through elevated search visibility.
  • Convert more site visitors into customers with optimized user experiences.
  • Streamline sales processes and maximize revenue from existing traffic.
  • Expand your local social media presence and reach more nearby prospects.
  • Build a stellar online reputation that attracts new business.

Pricing

$99 per location per month

Pros

✅Reporting is very user-freindly

✅Manual overview of services ensure better quality and accuracy

Cons

❌Can be expensive for small business

‍
